02 — Audience

A captive,
high-value audience

At 35,000 feet, phones are on flight mode. No algorithms. No competing notifications. Just your brand and a receptive decision-maker with nowhere else to look.

Who flies these routes
Business executives and senior professionals
Government officials and civil servants
Entrepreneurs and SME owners
High-income consumers — top 15% earners
Frequent flyers — 4 to 12 trips per year
Corporate decision-makers with purchasing authority
Attention at 35,000 ft
Phone on flight mode — algorithm removed
No notifications, no competing content
Mentally relaxed and present
Receptive to brand messages — no defensive wall
2 to 4 hours of uninterrupted dwell time
Unaided recall: 43% vs 4% for digital
03 — Placements

Premium ad placements

Every surface inside the cabin becomes a premium channel — from the moment passengers board to their final descent.

01
Tray Tables
Full or shared branding on the most-used surface during flight. Passengers look at it for hours on end.
02
Headrest Covers
Direct eye-level visibility for every passenger across every row in the entire cabin.
03
Seatback Panels
Large-format surfaces ideal for detailed brand storytelling across the full duration of the flight.
04
Overhead Bins
High-impact visibility during boarding and deplaning — the most active passenger moments.
05
Inflight Packaging
Tactile brand engagement through branded meal boxes and snack packs — a QR code from conversion.
06
Custom Formats
Bespoke integrations tailored entirely to your campaign's creative vision and objectives.

08 — Why FlyPack

Proven recall.
Zero competition.

In an era of 5-second attention spans, we deliver up to 4 hours of brand exposure to decision-makers who are relaxed, receptive, and have nowhere else to look.

43%
Unaided recall — inflight advertising
4%
Unaided recall — digital advertising
⛔
No skip. No scroll.
Passengers cannot fast-forward, swipe away, or install an ad blocker at 35,000 feet. Your brand owns the moment entirely.
🌟
Premium demographic
Reach high-income decision-makers — executives, officials, and entrepreneurs — at their most relaxed and receptive state.
📊
Fully managed execution
From professional design and placement logistics to post-campaign analytics — FlyPack handles everything end to end.
